name: Salted Egg Yolk Pastry , 3pcs , 5.6 oz
product_details: Salted egg yolk pastry is one of the most beloved Chinese desserts. It’s made by encasing an umami-flavored salted egg yolk with sweet lotus or red bean paste wrapped in flaky layered pastry crust. This pastry is particularly popular during the Mid-Autumn Festival and Chinese New Year. It’s believed that eating it will bring good luck as the shape of the yolk resembles the moon when cut in half, and the word “yolk” (黄) has the same sound as “gold” in Chinese. Enjoy a delightful sweet and savory taste in one bite.
product_highlights: Top ten souvenirs in Taichung, triple crown winner of the Golden Reputation Award and Best Popularity Award.
The outer layer is meticulously crafted into a golden flaky crust, paired with homemade Wandan red bean filling and wrapped around salted egg yolk, creating a superb blend of sweet and salty flavors.

Combining traditional techniques with exclusive craftsmanship, the filling features a soft and delicate layer of egg yolk, offering a moist and dense texture that overturns the traditional dry or tough impression of egg yolk pastries.
Reheating in an oven or microwave enhances the flavor even more.

name: Rousong Chicken Meat Floss Cake - Chinese Dessert, 15 Pieces, 17.46oz
product_details: Rousong Chicken Meat Floss Cakes are perfect if you're looking for a salty, savory treat. Each pack comes with 15 soft cakes, featuring a thin, flaky outer layer and filled with meat floss, or rousong, a light and fluffy filling made from dried, shredded chicken with a mouth-watering seasoning that's both salty and sweet. They're perfect for an afternoon snack or sharing with friends. Rousong is popular in China as well as in South East Asian countries. Youchen is based in Jinjiang, Fujian, China, and their specialty is rousong meat floss cakes. They produce a number of other sweet and savory snacks as well, including jam-filled fruit toast and egg yolk pies.

product_details: Rousong Chicken Meat Floss Cakes are perfect if you're looking for a salty, savory treat. Each pack comes with 15 soft cakes, featuring a thin, flaky outer layer and filled with meat floss, or rousong, a light and fluffy filling made from dried, shredded chicken with a mouth-watering seasoning that's both salty and sweet. They're perfect for an afternoon snack or sharing with friends. Rousong is popular in China as well as in South East Asian countries. Youchen is based in Jinjiang, Fujian, China, and their specialty is rousong meat floss cakes. They produce a number of other sweet and savory snacks as well, including jam-filled fruit toast and egg yolk pies.

product_details:
A popular snack in China, spicy konjac strips are low in calories but packed with flavor. Smooth and chewy, they have a texture similar to octopus or squid, and can be paired with other dishes or enjoyed on their own.

This Hot and Spicy Vegetarian Konjac is the perfect choice if you're looking for a healthy treat that's full of flavor. It's salty, and quite spicy. Each box comes with twenty bags, so you'll have plenty to enjoy.

For those who haven't encountered it before, konjac is a starchy tuber popular in China, Japan, Korea, and South East Asian countries, often used to make cakes and noodles with a smooth, springy texture. It's filling and high in fiber, making it a great choice for improving cholesterol and digestive health.

product_highlights: Kimbo Pork Sung Pork Floss, Rousong is dry, shredded pork. Typically, this pork floss, or pork fu is used for topping congee, garnishing for savory pastries, or as an addition to rice porridge
Roufu is thicker and more textured than Rousoung, or Pork Sung, leading to different uses in the two shredded pork

Sometimes referred to as Chinese cotton candy, this meat floss has a texture similar to coarse cotton and tastes like soy saucy sweetened, salty pork. One may even think of it as a shredded pork jerky
Add it to your congee or porridge, rice balls, eggs, or pastries, the possibilities are endless!
Distinguishable by the red or blue labels, Kimbo pork floss is a popular staple in many Asian households as a condiment and a topping

product_highlights: Baked at high temperature with the Ika-yaki technique, the original freshness of the fish skin is locked in.
The surface is slightly charred and crispy, while the inside retains the natural gelatin, offering a crispy exterior and a tender, glutinous interior with rich textural layers.
The secret spicy and fragrant recipe is spicy but not dry, and fragrant but not greasy.
Each piece is fully coated with seasonings, delivering a spicy and fragrant taste upon entry, with a fresh and fragrant aftertaste that makes you want to chew more.

product_details:
Ishiyaki technique:

Ishiyaki is a traditional Japanese grilling method that involves high-temperature quick grilling to lock in the original flavor of the ingredients. This fish skin is processed using the ishiyaki technique, with a slightly charred and crispy surface while still retaining the natural gelatin and freshness of the fish skin inside.

Selected Fish Skin:

Premium deep-sea fish skin is chosen, with thick flesh and rich collagen. It undergoes strict screening and deodorization treatment to ensure the final product is free of fishy smell and only has the fresh aroma of seafood.

Spicy and Aromatic Seasoning:

Our secret spicy and aromatic recipe blends chili peppers and spices perfectly, delivering a spicy yet not scorching, fragrant yet not greasy taste. Each piece of fish skin is evenly coated with the seasoning. Upon taking a bite, you first experience the spicy and fragrant flavor, followed by the natural freshness of the fish skin, creating a rich and layered taste.

Non-fried baking:

Unlike the greasiness of traditional fried fish skin, this fish skin is made through a non-fried baking process, which retains nutrients while offering a crisper and more refreshing taste. You can enjoy it without getting tired of it even after eating a lot.

High protein and low fat:

Fish skin is rich in collagen and high-quality protein, with a low fat content. It is an ideal choice for a healthy snack. It can satisfy your craving and also provide essential nutrients.
